title: Front Office Manager - Mango Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Mango Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Mango Hotels in Aurangabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mango Hotels:
Mango Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mango Hotels!
